Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class AcatsAsset

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.AcatsAsset
public class AcatsAsset extends Object
AcatsAsset - The asset being transferred If cash, the asset_id is the currency code (e.g. USD) and the position is the amount
